title: dontospermum lanzarotense
intro: Dontospermum lanzarotense, also known as the Canary Island don'tospermum, is a plant species endemic to the island of Lanzarote in the Canary Islands. It is a succulent plant with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues. The plant has been found to have anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of digestive problems, wounds, and skin conditions. Dontospermum lanzarotense can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or oil, allowing for various herbal preparations to be used for medicinal purposes.
